headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $201
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $193 to $201.
